name: Little Green Light Nonprofit CRM API
what_it_does: Little Green Light (LGL) REST API for small to mid-sized nonprofit donor management. Enables AI agents to manage constituent records and giving history, log gifts and pledges, track appeals and campaigns, manage event attendees, query donation data for reporting, and sync constituent information with external systems.
use_cases: Syncing donor records and giving history from data integration agents
Logging gift and pledge records from donation processing agents
Querying constituent data for appeal segmentation from fundraising agents
Managing event registrations and attendee records from event management agents
not_for: Large enterprise nonprofits requiring advanced workflow automation
Grant management without constituent relationship components
For-profit CRM use cases without nonprofit fundraising focus
best_when: A small or growing nonprofit using Little Green Light wants AI agents to keep donor records current, log gifts automatically, and maintain accurate constituent data for fundraising campaigns.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Constituent personal data and giving records are sensitive. LGL is designed for small nonprofits — complex automation at scale may exceed platform capabilities.

auth.notes: Little Green Light uses API key authentication via Bearer token in Authorization header. API keys are account-scoped with full access. No granular scope control. Rate limited to protect shared infrastructure.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; 30-day free trial available
pricing.paid_tiers: Flat monthly fee per account regardless of constituent count — affordable for small nonprofits
pricing.notes: Small business SaaS for nonprofits. Very affordable flat pricing model. Founded 2010. Popular with smaller nonprofits and startup organizations.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; avoid bulk polling to protect shared platform

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Constituent personal and giving data requires careful handling
No public MCP server — REST API with API key Bearer token
No webhooks — requires polling for any real-time integration
No granular scopes — API key grants full account access
Platform designed for small nonprofits — aggressive automation may stress shared infrastructure
US data residency only — verify for international nonprofit operations
agent_readiness.security_notes: Constituent personal and financial giving data. PCI-DSS. API key only, no scopes. US data residency. Small platform — treat with care.

security_score_components.security_notes: Nonprofit constituent and giving data. PCI-DSS. API key only, no scopes. US-only data residency.
